data.html:
// This is your Prisma schema file,
// learn more about it in the docs: https://pris.ly/d/prisma-schema

generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider  = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
  directUrl = env("DIRECT_DATABASE_URL")
}

// ============================================
// USER MODEL - Core user accounts
// ============================================
model User {
  id              String    @id @default(cuid())
  email           String    @unique
  name            String?
  password        String?   // Hashed password (nullable for OAuth users)
  role            String    @default("subscriber") // subscriber, provider, admin
  avatar          String?
  
  // OAuth
  googleId        String?   @unique // Google OAuth ID
  
  // Email verification
  emailVerified   Boolean   @default(false)
  emailVerifiedAt DateTime?
  
  // Provider profile (if role = provider)
  provider        Provider?
  
  // Subscriptions (as subscriber)
  subscriptions   Subscription[]
  
  // Notifications
  notifications   Notification[]
  
  // Payments
  payments        Payment[]
  
  // Activity tracking
  lastLoginAt     DateTime?
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt
  
  @@map("users")
}

// ============================================
// PROVIDER MODEL - Signal provider profiles
// ============================================
model Provider {
  id              String    @id @default(cuid())
  userId          String    @unique
  user            User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  
  // Profile info
  displayName     String
  bio             String?
  avatar          String?
  
  // Trading details
  pairs           String[]  // ["EUR/USD", "GBP/USD"]
  timeframes      String[]  // ["scalp", "day", "swing"]
  
  // Stats (auto-calculated)
  totalSignals    Int       @default(0)
  winRate         Float     @default(0)
  totalPips       Float     @default(0)
  avgRR           Float     @default(0)
  
  // Subscription pricing
  monthlyPrice    Float     @default(50)
  currency        String    @default("USDT")
  
  // Verification
  isVerified      Boolean   @default(false)
  verifiedAt      DateTime?
  
  // Status
  isActive        Boolean   @default(true)
  subscribers     Int       @default(0)
  
  // Relations
  signals         Signal[]
  subscriptions   Subscription[]
  
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt
  
  @@map("providers")
}

// ============================================
// SIGNAL MODEL - Trading signals
// ============================================
model Signal {
  id              String    @id @default(cuid())
  providerId      String
  provider        Provider  @relation(fields: [providerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  
  // Signal details
  pair            String    // e.g., "EUR/USD"
  direction       String    // "BUY" or "SELL"
  timeframe       String    // "scalp", "day", "swing"
  
  // Entry & Exit
  entryPrice      Float
  stopLoss        Float
  takeProfit1     Float
  takeProfit2     Float?
  takeProfit3     Float?
  
  // Analysis
  analysis        String?   // Text analysis
  
  // Results (filled after trade completes)
  status          String    @default("active") // active, hit_tp1, hit_tp2, hit_tp3, hit_sl, closed
  resultPips      Float?
  closedAt        DateTime?
  
  // Timestamps
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt
  
  @@map("signals")
}

// ============================================
// SUBSCRIPTION MODEL - User subscriptions to providers
// ============================================
model Subscription {
  id              String    @id @default(cuid())
  userId          String
  user            User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  
  providerId      String
  provider        Provider  @relation(fields: [providerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  
  // Subscription details
  status          String    @default("active") // active, expired, cancelled
  startDate       DateTime  @default(now())
  endDate         DateTime
  
  // Payment
  amount          Float
  currency        String    @default("USDT")
  paymentMethod   String?   // usdt, mtn_momo, airtel_money
  paymentStatus   String    @default("pending") // pending, completed, failed
  
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt
  
  @@unique([userId, providerId])
  @@map("subscriptions")
}

// ============================================
// NOTIFICATION MODEL - User notifications
// ============================================
model Notification {
  id              String    @id @default(cuid())
  userId          String
  user            User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  
  title           String
  message         String
  type            String    // signal, subscription, system
  
  isRead          Boolean   @default(false)
  readAt          DateTime?
  
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  
  @@map("notifications")
}

// ============================================
// PAYMENT MODEL - Payment transactions
// ============================================
model Payment {
  id              String    @id @default(cuid())
  userId          String
  user            User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  
  amount          Float
  currency        String    @default("USDT")
  
  type            String    // subscription, withdrawal
  status          String    @default("pending") // pending, completed, failed
  
  // Payment details
  paymentMethod   String?   // usdt, mtn_momo, airtel_money
  transactionId   String?   // External transaction ID
  
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt
  
  @@map("payments")
}
